calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-05-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Robert L. Dondero, Clerk Nicole Adams, Reporter JoAnn Bryce.

Parties present: Mohammed Bhuiya, plaintiff; David Mendez, attorney for plaintiff; Christina Jaochico and Ariel Cruz, defendants in pro per.

Case called for trial. Having engaged in further settlement discussions with Judge Pro Tem David Dawson the case has been settled. Plaintiff shall have judgment for $3,650 back rent and costs and possession of 374 5th Street # 303, San Francisco, CA. A writ may issue immediately, but no eviction will occur until May 15, 2003, 9:00 AM. If defendants pay $125 before May 15th, the eviction will be postponed until May 29, 2003. If an additional $125 is paid, the eviction will be postponed until June 5, 2003 and payment of an additional $125 will postpone the eviction until June 15, 2003. There is a general release of all claims and all parties to bear their own fees and costs, except those included in the $3,650 judgment amount.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-30-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT CHRISTINA JAOCHICO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT--OFF CALENDAR PER FILING OF FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT ON 4/9/03. (DAG/301) REPORTER: JOSEPH VICKSTEIN, CSR #4780

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-30-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Settlement Hearing.
Appearances: David G. Mendez, Esq. for plaintiff Mohammed S. Bhuiya
Cristina Jaochico, defendant in pro per
Ariel Arnolfo Cruz, defendant in pro per
Matter did not settle. Matter not reported. ( Judge Pro Tem: Irving Pfeffer; Clerk: Robert Goulding
